fields.title: Introduction to Complexity Analysis
fields.text_content:
# Big O Notation

Understanding time and space complexity is crucial for writing efficient code.

## Common Complexities
- O(1): Constant
- O(log n): Logarithmic
- O(n): Linear
- O(n log n): Linearithmic
- O(n^2): Quadratic
